title: Verify the 'Remind Me' toggle triggers the correct backend action and notification
description: Tests the functionality of the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle and confirms a notification is scheduled.
preconditions: User has an active trial with more than 24 hours remaining.
User is on the Trial Corner hub page.

steps.description: 1. Ensure the 'Remind me...' toggle is OFF.
2. Click the toggle to switch it ON.
3. Observe the micro-copy confirming a notification will be sent.
4. Check application logs or a debug panel to confirm an API call was made to schedule a WhatsApp/Push notification for 24 hours before the trial's expiration time.

expected_result: The toggle state is saved, and a backend job is successfully scheduled to send the user a notification at the correct time. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with page source 'trial corner'.
